title: limonium delicatulum subsp. santapolense
intro: Limonium delicatulum subsp. santapolense, also known as the Santapol limonium, is a type of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae, native to the Canary Islands. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Limonium delicatulum subsp. santapolense include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, but more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
